entry.name: unleash-client-node
entry.architecture: OO/service (Strategy classes, polling repository, metrics timer)

analysis.fullMapNote: session-authored atlas (Model B) + carve; roadmap units src-test(13)/src(6)/src-strategy(72)/src-repository(2); classify deferred to HITL
analysis.precisionNote: static gates fired real findings; grade found real gaps (rollout boundary > 0, default Math.random path, input guards); 15 strategy.ts survivors were false under the narrow test scope (75% with integration coverage)
analysis.surfacedProductBug: grade hung 36min; the per-mutant timeout did not kill the npx->vitest tree (fixed in #69)
analysis.coverageDetail: 94.2% lines (1246/1323), vitest v8, src-scoped. The 68% mutation grade is the stronger adequacy signal: 94% covered vs 68% faults caught is the coverage-overstates gap.
